# Pull Request

## What

<!-- 1-3 sentences on the change. -->

## Traceability

- Use Cases: UC-XXX, ...
- Requirements: FR-..., NFR-...
- ADRs: ADR-... (if applicable)

## How was it tested?

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] BDD scenarios added/updated and green in CI
- [ ] Coverage thresholds met (backend ≥ 80% line / 70% branch, frontend ≥ 70% line)

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Test First evidence in commit history
- [ ] Server-side validation and authorization in place (no client-only checks)
- [ ] No personal data in logs; pseudonymized child identifiers
- [ ] In-product UI text in Swiss High German, no sharp s
- [ ] Project docs (UC, arc42, ADR) updated
- [ ] Reviewed (`/review` or second pair of eyes)

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything special: known limitations, follow-ups, screenshots. -->
